title: Austin Treasure Map
html:
Austin Treasure Map

A gamified personal-favorites discovery map of Austin, live at yg4president.github.io/austin-treasure-map/. Built by Yahir as a side-project during the Rankett sprint era (first appears in browser tabs on 2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 1 10 38 am 5d2c4c60). Uses Leaflet + OpenStreetMap on GitHub Pages.

What it is

84 hand-curated Austin-area spots categorized: Eat 39 / Drink 11 / Explore 16 / Fun 11 / Shop 7 (2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 3 19 30 pm ac12c26c). The UI gamifies discovery with a "Next Adventure" prompt ("In the realm of North Austin, a gem lies undiscovered..."), Re-roll / Reveal buttons, and rank/XP progression — Stowaway → Deckhand at 75 XP (2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 9 06 18 pm a9b90201). Map style toggles (Map / Topo / City / Sat / Dark) and Share/Export/Import.

Why it matters

Pattern-sibling to the Best Sushi in Austin guide — the same instinct to encode personal taste as a shareable artifact. Gamification turns the recommendation-list pattern into a discovery game. Could plausibly become a Rankett-style tenant pattern (per-city instances) later.

Source summaries

  • 2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 1 10 38 am 5d2c4c60 — first sighting in tab strip
  • 2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 3 19 30 pm ac12c26c — full live UI
  • 2026 03 02 screenshot 2026 03 02 at 9 06 18 pm a9b90201 — XP/rank system

Connections

  • austin tx · the best sushi in austin guide · github pages
